name: obligation lien balance is not player credits

source.purpose: Forty Thousand lien pressure updates obligation balance 40000->60000 without clamping player-held credits.

obligation_lien.title: Registry lien
obligation_lien.terms: The PC owes the Registry lien balance.
obligation_lien.dueCondition: Due before registry clearance is restored.
obligation_lien.clearanceCondition: Paid down or legally waived by the Registry.

input.playerInput: I ask what the lien now says.

narrator.prose: The clerk turns the plate around. The Forty Thousand lien has doubled: sixty thousand credits now stand against your registry, but the 120 credits in your pocket have not moved.

mechanicalEffects.reason: The lien balance increases by 20000 credits.

updates.sourceQuote: sixty thousand credits now stand against your registry
